seoTitle: Middle Swan vs Middlesex — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Middle Swan and Middlesex. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Middle Swan vs Middlesex: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Middle Swan and Middlesex.
heading: Middle Swan vs Middlesex — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Middle Swan, Western Australia and Middlesex, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Middlesex has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Middle Swan (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Middle Swan or Middlesex safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Middle Swan has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Middlesex scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Middle Swan scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Middlesex scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Middle Swan or Middlesex?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Middlesex has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
